title: Hydrangea Silk Flowers (Lavender, 1 Piece)
features: Real Touch Hydrangeas: Featuring lifelike blue blooms and rich green leaves, this artificial hydrangea bush adds elegance to any space.
UV Resistant for Outdoor Use: Designed to withstand sunlight and harsh weather, these faux hydrangeas are perfect for outdoor weddings, patios, and gardens.
Adjustable Stems: The flexible stems allow for easy customization, making it simple to arrange in vases, planters, or floral arrangements.
Low Maintenance Beauty: Enjoy the beauty of hydrangeas without the hassle of watering, pruning, or wilting. Perfect for busy homeowners and event planners.
Versatile Décor: Ideal for weddings, centerpieces, home décor, and outdoor landscaping. A timeless addition to any setting.
Easy Care & Protection: Spray with Armor All before outdoor use for long-lasting protection and to keep your flowers looking vibrant for years.
description: Product Description Add a touch of timeless elegance to your space with the Lovely Lavender Beauty Hydrangea Bush. Standing at 20 inches tall with 7 sprays of vibrant lavender blooms, this UV-resistant hydrangea bush is a perfect choice for creating beautiful floral arrangements or adding a pop of color to your indoor or outdoor decor. Safety Warning This artificial plant may cause skin irritation if not handled with care. Keep away from children and pets. Use indoors and outdoors, but avoid extreme weather conditions and direct sunlight.
